name: subagent-manager
description: Delegate bounded subtasks to specialized background agents, including parallel fan-out and wait-all orchestration. Built-in types: explore, research, plan, review, test, general. Custom agent types can be defined in agents/*.md files.
when_to_use: Use this skill when the task can be split into an isolated subtask that can run in parallel.
Use this skill when several independent subtasks should be fanned out together and then waited on as a batch.
Use specialized agent types: built-in (explore, research, plan, review, test, general) or custom types defined in agents/*.md.
Use this skill when you need to check the progress or result of an already delegated sub-agent task.
Provide rich context (background, constraints, relevant files) to help the sub-agent understand the task better.
